title: Arizona teen helps elderly woman with dementia in 103F heat, officials warn of confusion as a sign of heatstroke
summary_full: Royal Cothrun, a fourteen-year-old boy, demonstrated extraordinary courage during a perilous heatwave by rescuing an elderly woman wandering aimlessly. With a swift instinct, he provided shade and facilitated her communication with her son, actions that were potentially lifesaving. The Arizona fire department is set to commend him for his heroic efforts, highlighting the critical risks associated with severe summer heat.
